acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Temporary re-exports removed
- [ ] Visibility tightened to intended surface
- [ ] No downstream compile regressions
description:
**Problem**
Temporary shims can become permanent scatter if not removed.
design: Delete migration re-exports, tighten module visibility, and ensure single source of truth per boundary type.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content: Started .27 cleanup with low-risk shim removals plus file-level dependency audit. Landed: (1) removed beads-daemon crate compatibility alias `mod daemon { pub use crate::metrics; }` by rewriting admission.rs to import `crate::metrics` directly, and (2) removed CLI daemon command type re-export shim by switching command enum/dispatch to `beads_cli::commands::daemon::DaemonCmd` directly (daemon.rs now only renders daemon info text). Validation: cargo check -p beads-daemon, cargo check -p beads-rs, cargo test -p beads-rs --test integration -- cli::critical_path:: (6 pass), just dylint all pass. Remaining .27 work is larger import-retargeting for daemon/cli shim modules with active consumers.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Progress: removed additional temporary shim layers.
- Deleted beads-rs CLI shim files: `src/cli/parsers.rs`, `src/cli/filters.rs`, `src/cli/validation.rs` after retargeting all CLI command imports.
- Removed CLI daemon command type re-export shim usage by switching command typing/dispatch to `beads_cli::commands::daemon::DaemonCmd` directly.
- Removed beads-daemon crate compatibility alias `mod daemon { pub use crate::metrics; }` and imported `crate::metrics` directly in compiled module(s).
No compile/test regressions in verification set.
Validation: cargo check -p beads-rs, cargo check -p beads-daemon, cargo test -p beads-rs --test integration -- cli::critical_path:: (6 pass), just dylint, cargo check --workspace.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Completed a major .27 cleanup pass removing additional temporary boundary shims and tightening visibility:

1) Removed daemon wrapper modules in beads-rs and retargeted all callsites (src + tests) to owning crates:
- deleted `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/{admission,broadcast,clock,git_lane,remote,scheduler}.rs`
- imports now use `beads_daemon::{admission,broadcast,clock,git_lane,remote,scheduler}` directly

2) Removed temporary repl frame/proto module wrappers and retargeted callsites:
- deleted `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/repl/{frame,proto}.rs`
- `repl/mod.rs` now re-exports frame/proto types/functions directly from `beads_daemon_core::repl::{frame,proto}`
- internal/tests updated to consume owning module paths

3) Removed temporary store wrapper modules:
- deleted `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/{store_lock,store_runtime}.rs`
- internal imports retargeted to `crate::daemon::store::{lock,runtime}`
- daemon top-level now explicitly re-exports stable lock/runtime boundary types

4) Tightened visibility:
- `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/ipc/mod.rs` changed `ResponseExt` export to `pub(crate)`

5) Removed migrate compatibility shim layer:
- deleted `crates/beads-rs/src/migrate/mod.rs`
- CLI migrate command now calls `beads_cli::migrate::import_go_export` directly

Validation:
- cargo check -p beads-rs
- cargo check --workspace
- cargo test -p beads-rs --test integration -- repl::ack::
- cargo test -p beads-rs --test integration -- daemon::store_lock::
- cargo test -p beads-rs --test integration --features slow-tests -- daemon::lifecycle:: (8 pass)
- just dylint
All green.

title: Remove temporary re-exports and tighten visibility boundaries
